verses.esv: Then I saw heaven opened, and behold, a white horse! The one sitting on it is called Faithful and True, and in righteousness he judges and makes war.
verses.kjv: And I saw heaven opened, and behold a white horse; and he that sat upon him was called Faithful and True, and in righteousness he doth judge and make war.
verses.bsb: Then I saw heaven standing open, and there before me was a white horse. And its rider is called Faithful and True. With righteousness He judges and wages war.

verses.esv: His eyes are like a flame of fire, and on his head are many diadems, and he has a name written that no one knows but himself.
verses.kjv: His eyes were as a flame of fire, and on his head were many crowns; and he had a name written, that no man knew, but he himself.
verses.bsb: He has eyes like blazing fire, and many royal crowns on His head. He has a name written on Him that only He Himself knows.

verses.esv: He is clothed in a robe dipped in blood, and the name by which he is called is The Word of God.
verses.kjv: And he was clothed with a vesture dipped in blood: and his name is called The Word of God.
verses.bsb: He is dressed in a robe dipped in blood, and His name is The Word of God.

verses.esv: And the armies of heaven, arrayed in fine linen, white and pure, were following him on white horses.
verses.kjv: And the armies which were in heaven followed him upon white horses, clothed in fine linen, white and clean.
verses.bsb: The armies of heaven, dressed in fine linen, white and pure, follow Him on white horses.

verses.esv: From his mouth comes a sharp sword with which to strike down the nations, and he will rule them with a rod of iron. He will tread the winepress of the fury of the wrath of God the Almighty.
verses.kjv: And out of his mouth goeth a sharp sword, that with it he should smite the nations: and he shall rule them with a rod of iron: and he treadeth the winepress of the fierceness and wrath of Almighty God.
verses.bsb: And from His mouth proceeds a sharp sword with which to strike down the nations, and He will rule them with an iron scepter. He treads the winepress of the fury of the wrath of God the Almighty.

verses.esv: On his robe and on his thigh he has a name written, King of kings and Lord of lords.
verses.kjv: And he hath on his vesture and on his thigh a name written, KING OF KINGS, AND LORD OF LORDS.
verses.bsb: And He has a name written on His robe and on His thigh:  KING OF KINGS AND LORD OF LORDS.

verses.esv: Then I saw an angel standing in the sun, and with a loud voice he called to all the birds that fly directly overhead, “Come, gather for the great supper of God,
verses.kjv: And I saw an angel standing in the sun; and he cried with a loud voice, saying to all the fowls that fly in the midst of heaven, Come and gather yourselves together unto the supper of the great God;
verses.bsb: Then I saw an angel standing in the sun, and he cried out in a loud voice to all the birds flying overhead, “Come, gather together for the great supper of God,

verses.esv: to eat the flesh of kings, the flesh of captains, the flesh of mighty men, the flesh of horses and their riders, and the flesh of all men, both free and slave, both small and great.”
verses.kjv: That ye may eat the flesh of kings, and the flesh of captains, and the flesh of mighty men, and the flesh of horses, and of them that sit on them, and the flesh of all men, both free and bond, both small and great.
verses.bsb: so that you may eat the flesh of kings and commanders and mighty men, of horses and riders, of everyone slave and free, small and great.”

verses.esv: And I saw the beast and the kings of the earth with their armies gathered to make war against him who was sitting on the horse and against his army.
verses.kjv: And I saw the beast, and the kings of the earth, and their armies, gathered together to make war against him that sat on the horse, and against his army.
verses.bsb: Then I saw the beast and the kings of the earth with their armies assembled to wage war against the One seated on the horse, and against His army.

verses.esv: And the beast was captured, and with it the false prophet who in its presence had done the signs by which he deceived those who had received the mark of the beast and those who worshiped its image. These two were thrown alive into the lake of fire that burns with sulfur.
verses.kjv: And the beast was taken, and with him the false prophet that wrought miracles before him, with which he deceived them that had received the mark of the beast, and them that worshipped his image. These both were cast alive into a lake of fire burning with brimstone.
verses.bsb: But the beast was captured along with the false prophet, who on its behalf had performed signs deceiving those who had the mark of the beast and worshiped its image. Both the beast and the false prophet were thrown alive into the fiery lake of burning sulfur.

verses.esv: And the rest were slain by the sword that came from the mouth of him who was sitting on the horse, and all the birds were gorged with their flesh.
verses.kjv: And the remnant were slain with the sword of him that sat upon the horse, which sword proceeded out of his mouth: and all the fowls were filled with their flesh.
verses.bsb: And the rest were killed with the sword that proceeded from the mouth of the One seated on the horse.  And all the birds gorged themselves on their flesh.

verses.esv: Then I saw an angel coming down from heaven, holding in his hand the key to the bottomless pit and a great chain.
verses.kjv: AND I saw an angel come down from heaven, having the key of the bottomless pit and a great chain in his hand.
verses.bsb: Then I saw an angel coming down from heaven with the key to the Abyss, holding in his hand a great chain.

verses.esv: And he seized the dragon, that ancient serpent, who is the devil and Satan, and bound him for a thousand years,
verses.kjv: And he laid hold on the dragon, that old serpent, which is the Devil, and Satan, and bound him a thousand years,
verses.bsb: He seized the dragon, that ancient serpent who is the devil and Satan, and bound him for a thousand years.

verses.esv: and threw him into the pit, and shut it and sealed it over him, so that he might not deceive the nations any longer, until the thousand years were ended. After that he must be released for a little while.
verses.kjv: And cast him into the bottomless pit, and shut him up, and set a seal upon him, that he should deceive the nations no more, till the thousand years should be fulfilled: and after that he must be loosed a little season.
verses.bsb: And he threw him into the Abyss, shut it, and sealed it over him, so that he could not deceive the nations until the thousand years were complete. After that, he must be released for a brief period of time.

verses.esv: Then I saw thrones, and seated on them were those to whom the authority to judge was committed. Also I saw the souls of those who had been beheaded for the testimony of Jesus and for the word of God, and those who had not worshiped the beast or its image and had not received its mark on their foreheads or their hands. They came to life and reigned with Christ for a thousand years.
verses.kjv: And I saw thrones, and they sat upon them, and judgment was given unto them: and I saw the souls of them that were beheaded for the witness of Jesus, and for the word of God, and which had not worshipped the beast, neither his image, neither had received his mark upon their foreheads, or in their hands; and they lived and reigned with Christ a thousand years.
verses.bsb: Then I saw the thrones, and those seated on them had been given authority to judge. And I saw the souls of those who had been beheaded for their testimony of Jesus and for the word of God, and those who had not worshiped the beast or its image, and had not received its mark on their foreheads or hands. And they came to life and reigned with Christ for a thousand years.

verses.esv: The rest of the dead did not come to life until the thousand years were ended. This is the first resurrection.
verses.kjv: But the rest of the dead lived not again until the thousand years were finished. This is the first resurrection.
verses.bsb: The rest of the dead did not come back to life until the thousand years were complete. This is the first resurrection.

verses.esv: Blessed and holy is the one who shares in the first resurrection! Over such the second death has no power, but they will be priests of God and of Christ, and they will reign with him for a thousand years.
verses.kjv: Blessed and holy is he that hath part in the first resurrection: on such the second death hath no power, but they shall be priests of God and of Christ, and shall reign with him a thousand years.
verses.bsb: Blessed and holy are those who share in the first resurrection! The second death has no power over them, but they will be priests of God and of Christ, and will reign with Him for a thousand years.

verses.esv: And when the thousand years are ended, Satan will be released from his prison
verses.kjv: And when the thousand years are expired, Satan shall be loosed out of his prison,
verses.bsb: When the thousand years are complete, Satan will be released from his prison,

verses.esv: and will come out to deceive the nations that are at the four corners of the earth, Gog and Magog, to gather them for battle; their number is like the sand of the sea.
verses.kjv: And shall go out to deceive the nations which are in the four quarters of the earth, Gog and Magog, to gather them together to battle: the number of whom is as the sand of the sea.
verses.bsb: and will go out to deceive the nations in the four corners of the earth—Gog and Magog—to assemble them for battle. Their number is like the sand of the seashore.

verses.esv: And they marched up over the broad plain of the earth and surrounded the camp of the saints and the beloved city, but fire came down from heaven and consumed them,
verses.kjv: And they went up on the breadth of the earth, and compassed the camp of the saints about, and the beloved city: and fire came down from God out of heaven, and devoured them.
verses.bsb: And they marched across the broad expanse of the earth and surrounded the camp of the saints and the beloved city. But fire came down from heaven and consumed them.

verses.esv: and the devil who had deceived them was thrown into the lake of fire and sulfur where the beast and the false prophet were, and they will be tormented day and night forever and ever.
verses.kjv: And the devil that deceived them was cast into the lake of fire and brimstone, where the beast and the false prophet are, and shall be tormented day and night for ever and ever.
verses.bsb: And the devil who had deceived them was thrown into the lake of fire and sulfur, into which the beast and the false prophet had already been thrown. There they will be tormented day and night forever and ever.

verses.esv: Then I saw a great white throne and him who was seated on it. From his presence earth and sky fled away, and no place was found for them.
verses.kjv: And I saw a great white throne, and him that sat on it, from whose face the earth and the heaven fled away; and there was found no place for them.
verses.bsb: Then I saw a great white throne and the One seated on it. Earth and heaven fled from His presence, and no place was found for them.

verses.esv: And I saw the dead, great and small, standing before the throne, and books were opened. Then another book was opened, which is the book of life. And the dead were judged by what was written in the books, according to what they had done.
verses.kjv: And I saw the dead, small and great, stand before God; and the books were opened: and another book was opened, which is the book of life: and the dead were judged out of those things which were written in the books, according to their works.
verses.bsb: And I saw the dead, great and small, standing before the throne.  And there were open books, and one of them was the Book of Life. And the dead were judged according to their deeds, as recorded in the books.

verses.esv: And the sea gave up the dead who were in it, Death and Hades gave up the dead who were in them, and they were judged, each one of them, according to what they had done.
verses.kjv: And the sea gave up the dead which were in it; and death and hell delivered up the dead which were in them: and they were judged every man according to their works.
verses.bsb: The sea gave up its dead, and Death and Hades gave up their dead, and each one was judged according to his deeds.

verses.esv: Then Death and Hades were thrown into the lake of fire. This is the second death, the lake of fire.
verses.kjv: And death and hell were cast into the lake of fire. This is the second death.
verses.bsb: Then Death and Hades were thrown into the lake of fire. This is the second death—the lake of fire.

verses.esv: And if anyone's name was not found written in the book of life, he was thrown into the lake of fire.
verses.kjv: And whosoever was not found written in the book of life was cast into the lake of fire.
verses.bsb: And if anyone was found whose name was not written in the Book of Life, he was thrown into the lake of fire.

verses.esv: Then I saw a new heaven and a new earth, for the first heaven and the first earth had passed away, and the sea was no more.
verses.kjv: AND I saw a new heaven and a new earth: for the first heaven and the first earth were passed away; and there was no more sea.
verses.bsb: Then I saw a new heaven and a new earth, for the first heaven and earth had passed away, and the sea was no more.

verses.esv: And I saw the holy city, new Jerusalem, coming down out of heaven from God, prepared as a bride adorned for her husband.
verses.kjv: And I John saw the holy city, new Jerusalem, coming down from God out of heaven, prepared as a bride adorned for her husband.
verses.bsb: I saw the holy city, the new Jerusalem, coming down out of heaven from God, prepared as a bride adorned for her husband.

verses.esv: And I heard a loud voice from the throne saying, “Behold, the dwelling place of God is with man. He will dwell with them, and they will be his people, and God himself will be with them as their God.
verses.kjv: And I heard a great voice out of heaven saying, Behold, the tabernacle of God is with men, and he will dwell with them, and they shall be his people, and God himself shall be with them, and be their God.
verses.bsb: And I heard a loud voice from the throne saying:  “Behold, the dwelling place of God is with man, and He will dwell with them. They will be His people, and God Himself will be with them as their God.

verses.esv: He will wipe away every tear from their eyes, and death shall be no more, neither shall there be mourning, nor crying, nor pain anymore, for the former things have passed away.”
verses.kjv: And God shall wipe away all tears from their eyes; and there shall be no more death, neither sorrow, nor crying, neither shall there be any more pain: for the former things are passed away.
verses.bsb: ‘He will wipe away every tear from their eyes,’ and there will be no more death or mourning or crying or pain, for the former things have passed away.”

verses.esv: And he who was seated on the throne said, “Behold, I am making all things new.” Also he said, “Write this down, for these words are trustworthy and true.”
verses.kjv: And he that sat upon the throne said, Behold, I make all things new. And he said unto me, Write: for these words are true and faithful.
verses.bsb: And the One seated on the throne said, “Behold, I make all things new.” Then He said, “Write this down, for these words are faithful and true.”

verses.esv: And he said to me, “It is done! I am the Alpha and the Omega, the beginning and the end. To the thirsty I will give from the spring of the water of life without payment.
verses.kjv: And he said unto me, It is done. I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end. I will give unto him that is athirst of the fountain of the water of life freely.
verses.bsb: And He told me, “It is done! I am the Alpha and the Omega, the Beginning and the End. To the thirsty I will give freely from the spring of the water of life.

verses.esv: The one who conquers will have this heritage, and I will be his God and he will be my son.
verses.kjv: He that overcometh shall inherit all things; and I will be his God, and he shall be my son.
verses.bsb: The one who overcomes will inherit all things, and I will be his God, and he will be My son.

verses.esv: But as for the cowardly, the faithless, the detestable, as for murderers, the sexually immoral, sorcerers, idolaters, and all liars, their portion will be in the lake that burns with fire and sulfur, which is the second death.”
verses.kjv: But the fearful, and unbelieving, and the abominable, and murderers, and whoremongers, and sorcerers, and idolaters, and all liars, shall have their part in the lake which burneth with fire and brimstone: which is the second death.
verses.bsb: But to the cowardly and unbelieving and abominable and murderers and sexually immoral and sorcerers and idolaters and all liars, their place will be in the lake that burns with fire and sulfur. This is the second death.”

verses.esv: Then came one of the seven angels who had the seven bowls full of the seven last plagues and spoke to me, saying, “Come, I will show you the Bride, the wife of the Lamb.”
verses.kjv: And there came unto me one of the seven angels which had the seven vials full of the seven last plagues, and talked with me, saying, Come hither, I will shew thee the bride, the Lamb’s wife.
verses.bsb: Then one of the seven angels with the seven bowls full of the seven final plagues came and said to me, “Come, I will show you the bride, the wife of the Lamb.”

verses.esv: And he carried me away in the Spirit to a great, high mountain, and showed me the holy city Jerusalem coming down out of heaven from God,
verses.kjv: And he carried me away in the spirit to a great and high mountain, and shewed me that great city, the holy Jerusalem, descending out of heaven from God,
verses.bsb: And he carried me away in the Spirit to a mountain great and high, and showed me the holy city of Jerusalem coming down out of heaven from God,

verses.esv: having the glory of God, its radiance like a most rare jewel, like a jasper, clear as crystal.
verses.kjv: Having the glory of God: and her light was like unto a stone most precious, even like a jasper stone, clear as crystal;
verses.bsb: shining with the glory of God. Its radiance was like a most precious jewel, like a jasper, as clear as crystal.

verses.esv: It had a great, high wall, with twelve gates, and at the gates twelve angels, and on the gates the names of the twelve tribes of the sons of Israel were inscribed—
verses.kjv: And had a wall great and high, and had twelve gates, and at the gates twelve angels, and names written thereon, which are the names of the twelve tribes of the children of Israel:
verses.bsb: The city had a great and high wall with twelve gates inscribed with the names of the twelve tribes of Israel, and twelve angels at the gates.

verses.esv: on the east three gates, on the north three gates, on the south three gates, and on the west three gates.
verses.kjv: On the east three gates; on the north three gates; on the south three gates; and on the west three gates.
verses.bsb: There were three gates on the east, three on the north, three on the south, and three on the west.

verses.esv: And the wall of the city had twelve foundations, and on them were the twelve names of the twelve apostles of the Lamb.
verses.kjv: And the wall of the city had twelve foundations, and in them the names of the twelve apostles of the Lamb.
verses.bsb: The wall of the city had twelve foundations bearing the names of the twelve apostles of the Lamb.

verses.esv: And the one who spoke with me had a measuring rod of gold to measure the city and its gates and walls.
verses.kjv: And he that talked with me had a golden reed to measure the city, and the gates thereof, and the wall thereof.
verses.bsb: The angel who spoke with me had a golden measuring rod to measure the city and its gates and walls.

verses.esv: The city lies foursquare, its length the same as its width. And he measured the city with his rod, 12,000 stadia. Its length and width and height are equal.
verses.kjv: And the city lieth foursquare, and the length is as large as the breadth: and he measured the city with the reed, twelve thousand furlongs. The length and the breadth and the height of it are equal.
verses.bsb: The city lies foursquare, with its width the same as its length. And he measured the city with the rod, and all its dimensions were equal—12,000 stadia in length and width and height.

verses.esv: He also measured its wall, 144 cubits by human measurement, which is also an angel's measurement.
verses.kjv: And he measured the wall thereof, an hundred and forty and four cubits, according to the measure of a man, that is, of the angel.
verses.bsb: And he measured its wall to be 144 cubits, by the human measure the angel was using.

verses.esv: The wall was built of jasper, while the city was pure gold, like clear glass.
verses.kjv: And the building of the wall of it was of jasper: and the city was pure gold, like unto clear glass.
verses.bsb: The wall was made of jasper, and the city itself of pure gold, as pure as glass.

verses.esv: The foundations of the wall of the city were adorned with every kind of jewel. The first was jasper, the second sapphire, the third agate, the fourth emerald,
verses.kjv: And the foundations of the wall of the city were garnished with all manner of precious stones. The first foundation was jasper; the second, sapphire; the third, a chalcedony; the fourth, an emerald;
verses.bsb: The foundations of the city walls were adorned with every kind of precious stone:  The first foundation was jasper,   the second sapphire,   the third chalcedony,   the fourth emerald,

verses.esv: the fifth onyx, the sixth carnelian, the seventh chrysolite, the eighth beryl, the ninth topaz, the tenth chrysoprase, the eleventh jacinth, the twelfth amethyst.
verses.kjv: The fifth, sardonyx; the sixth, sardius; the seventh, chrysolite; the eighth, beryl; the ninth, a topaz; the tenth, a chrysoprasus; the eleventh, a jacinth; the twelfth, an amethyst.
verses.bsb: the fifth sardonyx,   the sixth carnelian,   the seventh chrysolite,   the eighth beryl,   the ninth topaz,   the tenth chrysoprase,   the eleventh jacinth,   and the twelfth amethyst.

verses.esv: And the twelve gates were twelve pearls, each of the gates made of a single pearl, and the street of the city was pure gold, like transparent glass.
verses.kjv: And the twelve gates were twelve pearls; every several gate was of one pearl: and the street of the city was pure gold, as it were transparent glass.
verses.bsb: And the twelve gates were twelve pearls, with each gate consisting of a single pearl. The main street of the city was pure gold, as clear as glass.

verses.esv: And I saw no temple in the city, for its temple is the Lord God the Almighty and the Lamb.
verses.kjv: And I saw no temple therein: for the Lord God Almighty and the Lamb are the temple of it.
verses.bsb: But I saw no temple in the city, because the Lord God Almighty and the Lamb are its temple.

verses.esv: And the city has no need of sun or moon to shine on it, for the glory of God gives it light, and its lamp is the Lamb.
verses.kjv: And the city had no need of the sun, neither of the moon, to shine in it: for the glory of God did lighten it, and the Lamb is the light thereof.
verses.bsb: And the city has no need of sun or moon to shine on it, because the glory of God illuminates the city, and the Lamb is its lamp.

verses.esv: By its light will the nations walk, and the kings of the earth will bring their glory into it,
verses.kjv: And the nations of them which are saved shall walk in the light of it: and the kings of the earth do bring their glory and honour into it.
verses.bsb: By its light the nations will walk, and into it the kings of the earth will bring their glory.

verses.esv: and its gates will never be shut by day—and there will be no night there.
verses.kjv: And the gates of it shall not be shut at all by day: for there shall be no night there.
verses.bsb: Its gates will never be shut at the end of the day, because there will be no night there.

verses.esv: They will bring into it the glory and the honor of the nations.
verses.kjv: And they shall bring the glory and honour of the nations into it.
verses.bsb: And into the city will be brought the glory and honor of the nations.

verses.esv: But nothing unclean will ever enter it, nor anyone who does what is detestable or false, but only those who are written in the Lamb's book of life.
verses.kjv: And there shall in no wise enter into it any thing that defileth, neither whatsoever worketh abomination, or maketh a lie: but they which are written in the Lamb’s book of life.
verses.bsb: But nothing unclean will ever enter it, nor anyone who practices an abomination or a lie, but only those whose names are written in the Lamb’s Book of Life.

verses.esv: Then the angel showed me the river of the water of life, bright as crystal, flowing from the throne of God and of the Lamb
verses.kjv: AND he shewed me a pure river of water of life, clear as crystal, proceeding out of the throne of God and of the Lamb.
verses.bsb: Then the angel showed me a river of the water of life, as clear as crystal, flowing from the throne of God and of the Lamb

verses.esv: through the middle of the street of the city; also, on either side of the river, the tree of life with its twelve kinds of fruit, yielding its fruit each month. The leaves of the tree were for the healing of the nations.
verses.kjv: In the midst of the street of it, and on either side of the river, was there the tree of life, which bare twelve manner of fruits, and yielded her fruit every month: and the leaves of the tree were for the healing of the nations.
verses.bsb: down the middle of the main street of the city. On either side of the river stood a tree of life, bearing twelve kinds of fruit and yielding a fresh crop for each month. And the leaves of the tree are for the healing of the nations.

verses.esv: No longer will there be anything accursed, but the throne of God and of the Lamb will be in it, and his servants will worship him.
verses.kjv: And there shall be no more curse: but the throne of God and of the Lamb shall be in it; and his servants shall serve him:
verses.bsb: No longer will there be any curse. The throne of God and of the Lamb will be within the city, and His servants will worship Him.

verses.esv: They will see his face, and his name will be on their foreheads.
verses.kjv: And they shall see his face; and his name shall be in their foreheads.
verses.bsb: They will see His face, and His name will be on their foreheads.

verses.esv: And night will be no more. They will need no light of lamp or sun, for the Lord God will be their light, and they will reign forever and ever.
verses.kjv: And there shall be no night there; and they need no candle, neither light of the sun; for the Lord God giveth them light: and they shall reign for ever and ever.
verses.bsb: There will be no more night in the city, and they will have no need for the light of a lamp or of the sun. For the Lord God will shine on them, and they will reign forever and ever.

verses.esv: And he said to me, “These words are trustworthy and true. And the Lord, the God of the spirits of the prophets, has sent his angel to show his servants what must soon take place.”
verses.kjv: And he said unto me, These sayings are faithful and true: and the Lord God of the holy prophets sent his angel to shew unto his servants the things which must shortly be done.
verses.bsb: Then the angel said to me, “These words are faithful and true. The Lord, the God of the spirits of the prophets, has sent His angel to show His servants what must soon take place.”

verses.esv: “And behold, I am coming soon. Blessed is the one who keeps the words of the prophecy of this book.”
verses.kjv: Behold, I come quickly: blessed is he that keepeth the sayings of the prophecy of this book.
verses.bsb: “Behold, I am coming soon. Blessed is the one who keeps the words of prophecy in this book.”

verses.esv: I, John, am the one who heard and saw these things. And when I heard and saw them, I fell down to worship at the feet of the angel who showed them to me,
verses.kjv: And I John saw these things, and heard them. And when I had heard and seen, I fell down to worship before the feet of the angel which shewed me these things.
verses.bsb: And I am John, who heard and saw these things. And when I had heard and seen them, I fell down to worship at the feet of the angel who had shown me these things.

verses.esv: but he said to me, “You must not do that! I am a fellow servant with you and your brothers the prophets, and with those who keep the words of this book. Worship God.”
verses.kjv: Then saith he unto me, See thou do it not: for I am thy fellowservant, and of thy brethren the prophets, and of them which keep the sayings of this book: worship God.
verses.bsb: But he said to me, “Do not do that! I am a fellow servant with you and your brothers the prophets, and with those who keep the words of this book. Worship God!”

verses.esv: And he said to me, “Do not seal up the words of the prophecy of this book, for the time is near.
verses.kjv: And he saith unto me, Seal not the sayings of the prophecy of this book: for the time is at hand.
verses.bsb: Then he told me, “Do not seal up the words of prophecy in this book, because the time is near.

verses.esv: Let the evildoer still do evil, and the filthy still be filthy, and the righteous still do right, and the holy still be holy.”
verses.kjv: He that is unjust, let him be unjust still: and he which is filthy, let him be filthy still: and he that is righteous, let him be righteous still: and he that is holy, let him be holy still.
verses.bsb: Let the unrighteous continue to be unrighteous, and the vile continue to be vile; let the righteous continue to practice righteousness, and the holy continue to be holy.”

verses.esv: “Behold, I am coming soon, bringing my recompense with me, to repay each one for what he has done.
verses.kjv: And, behold, I come quickly; and my reward is with me, to give every man according as his work shall be.
verses.bsb: “Behold, I am coming soon, and My reward is with Me, to give to each one according to what he has done.

verses.esv: I am the Alpha and the Omega, the first and the last, the beginning and the end.”
verses.kjv: I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end, the first and the last.
verses.bsb: I am the Alpha and the Omega, the First and the Last, the Beginning and the End.”

verses.esv: Blessed are those who wash their robes, so that they may have the right to the tree of life and that they may enter the city by the gates.
verses.kjv: Blessed are they that do his commandments, that they may have right to the tree of life, and may enter in through the gates into the city.
verses.bsb: Blessed are those who wash their robes, so that they may have the right to the tree of life and may enter the city by its gates.

verses.esv: Outside are the dogs and sorcerers and the sexually immoral and murderers and idolaters, and everyone who loves and practices falsehood.
verses.kjv: For without are dogs, and sorcerers, and whoremongers, and murderers, and idolaters, and whosoever loveth and maketh a lie.
verses.bsb: But outside are the dogs, the sorcerers, the sexually immoral, the murderers, the idolaters, and everyone who loves and practices falsehood.

verses.esv: “I, Jesus, have sent my angel to testify to you about these things for the churches. I am the root and the descendant of David, the bright morning star.”
verses.kjv: I Jesus have sent mine angel to testify unto you these things in the churches. I am the root and the offspring of David, and the bright and morning star.
verses.bsb: “I, Jesus, have sent My angel to give you this testimony for the churches. I am the Root and the Offspring of David, the bright Morning Star.”

verses.esv: The Spirit and the Bride say, “Come.” And let the one who hears say, “Come.” And let the one who is thirsty come; let the one who desires take the water of life without price.
verses.kjv: And the Spirit and the bride say, Come. And let him that heareth say, Come. And let him that is athirst come. And whosoever will, let him take the water of life freely.
verses.bsb: The Spirit and the bride say, “Come!” Let the one who hears say, “Come!” And let the one who is thirsty come, and the one who desires the water of life drink freely.

verses.esv: I warn everyone who hears the words of the prophecy of this book: if anyone adds to them, God will add to him the plagues described in this book,
verses.kjv: For I testify unto every man that heareth the words of the prophecy of this book, If any man shall add unto these things, God shall add unto him the plagues that are written in this book:
verses.bsb: I testify to everyone who hears the words of prophecy in this book: If anyone adds to them, God will add to him the plagues described in this book.

verses.esv: and if anyone takes away from the words of the book of this prophecy, God will take away his share in the tree of life and in the holy city, which are described in this book.
verses.kjv: And if any man shall take away from the words of the book of this prophecy, God shall take away his part out of the book of life, and out of the holy city, and from the things which are written in this book.
verses.bsb: And if anyone takes away from the words of this book of prophecy, God will take away his share in the tree of life and the holy city, which are described in this book.

verses.esv: He who testifies to these things says, “Surely I am coming soon.” Amen. Come, Lord Jesus!
verses.kjv: He which testifieth these things saith, Surely I come quickly. Amen. Even so, come, Lord Jesus.
verses.bsb: He who testifies to these things says, “Yes, I am coming soon.” Amen. Come, Lord Jesus!

verses.esv: The grace of the Lord Jesus be with all. Amen.
verses.kjv: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen. THE END.
verses.bsb: The grace of the Lord Jesus be with all the saints.  Amen.
